name: yxj-paper-os
description: Model-led paper planning with reproducible template-corpus statistics, composable academic lenses, and scoped writing handoffs.

interface.shortDescription: Design papers from evidence and target-corpus patterns.
interface.longDescription: YXJ Paper OS prepares paper-planning workspaces with a cognitive kernel, reproducible target-journal and target-topic corpus statistics, conditional academic lenses, sparse traceable records, and scoped writing handoffs without drafting manuscripts or executing downstream skills.
capabilities: Text, structure, citation, figure, table, equation, and algorithm analysis
interface.defaultPrompt: Use yxj-paper-os to analyze my target-journal and target-topic article corpus, prepare the paper project, and compile a scoped writing design pack.
